case_title: JIMSON NG et al VS. MOUSA HUSARY et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT HUSARY, MOUSA

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-25-2003 CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH APR-18-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY ROMY BARULICH. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT.
